successCriteria.description: src/shared/types/index.ts exists and exports all enums (LeaveType, LeaveRequestStatus, EmploymentStatus, NotificationStatus, AuditAction), interfaces (Employee, LeaveRequest, LeaveBalance, LeavePolicy, Notification, AuditRecord, ValidationResult), and DTOs (CreateLeaveRequestDto, UpdateLeaveRequestDto, LeaveRequestQueryParams, CreateLeaveBalanceDto, CreateNotificationDto, CreateAuditRecordDto, CreateEmployeeDto, UpdateEmployeeDto, CreateLeavePolicyDto, UpdateLeavePolicyDto).

src/shared/base-repository.ts exists and exports abstract class BaseRepository<T> with abstract methods findById, findAll, create, update, delete, each accepting an optional PoolClient for transaction support.
src/app.ts exports an async function buildApp that creates a Fastify instance, registers @fastify/cors and @fastify/sensible plugins, and defines a /health route.
src/index.ts imports buildApp from ./app, starts the server on the port from process.env.PORT (default 3000), and logs the running port.
package.json includes 'fastify', '@fastify/cors', and '@fastify/sensible' as dependencies (added via npm install).
No Express-related imports or references remain in src/app.ts or src/index.ts.
All TypeScript files compile without errors when running tsc --noEmit.
The base repository pattern enforces GP-001 by wrapping all database access through the abstract repository contract; no direct pg queries exist outside repository implementations.

constraints: GP-001: All database access goes through repository interfaces (BaseRepository enforces this).
GP-006: No unhandled promise rejections (the start function catches errors).
No Express-related imports or references remain in src/app.ts or src/index.ts.
outOfScope: Phase 2-10 implementations (employee, policy, balance, leave, notification, audit modules).
Service, controller, and route layers for any module.
Actual business logic for leave management.
Unit/integration tests for the new types and base repository.
